'''ân-t-f-f''' ('''kanatfefoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:excern|excern]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-t-f-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:excern|excern]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-t-f-f
|-
! Lemma
| kanatfefoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thinatfefoko|thinatfefoko]] || [[word:jinatfefoko|jinatfefoko]] || [[word:shinatfefoko|shinatfefoko]] || [[word:kinatfefoko|kinatfefoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthunatfefoko|thuthunatfefoko]] || [[word:jujunatfefoko|jujunatfefoko]] || [[word:shushunatfefoko|shushunatfefoko]] || [[word:kukunatfefoko|kukunatfefoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thonatfefoko|thonatfefoko]] || [[word:jonatfefoko|jonatfefoko]] || [[word:shonatfefoko|shonatfefoko]] || [[word:konatfefoko|konatfefoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thonatfefoko|thonatfefoko]] || [[word:jonatfefoko|jonatfefoko]] || [[word:shonatfefoko|shonatfefoko]] || [[word:konatfefoko|konatfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠnatfefoko|thĂŠnatfefoko]] || [[word:jĂŠnatfefoko|jĂŠnatfefoko]] || [[word:shĂŠnatfefoko|shĂŠnatfefoko]] || [[word:kĂŠnatfefoko|kĂŠnatfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathanatfefoko|thathanatfefoko]] || [[word:jajanatfefoko|jajanatfefoko]] || [[word:shashanatfefoko|shashanatfefoko]] || [[word:kakanatfefoko|kakanatfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thanatfefoko|thanatfefoko]] || [[word:janatfefoko|janatfefoko]] || [[word:shanatfefoko|shanatfefoko]] || [[word:kanatfefoko|kanatfefoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thanatfefoko|thanatfefoko]] || [[word:janatfefoko|janatfefoko]] || [[word:shanatfefoko|shanatfefoko]] || [[word:kanatfefoko|kanatfefoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
